## Meeting Purpose

[Announce Series A funding, introduce new team members, and share company vision and goals.](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX raised $12.5M Series A led by Madrona Venture Group](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Company has grown to 31 full-time employees, with rapid hiring continuing](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Reached $6M ARR, growing 14x in 8 months with 39 enterprise clients](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Building AI-powered "Content OS" to revolutionize knowledge work productivity](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [2023 goal: Reach $22M ARR and 100+ clients by scaling to 3-4 new client kick-offs per week](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=2372.0)

## Topics

### New Team Member Introductions

  - [Bridget McGillivray (Vancouver) - Operations, HR](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Ismail Ajagbe (Nigeria) - Technical Editor](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Elvis Goren (Winnipeg) - Managing Editor](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Nem Simic (Florianópolis) - Account Manager](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Rachel Pasche (Flagstaff, AZ) - Content role, former travel journalist](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [David Galic (Belgrade) - Role unspecified, pizza-making hobbyist](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Deya Bhattacharya (Bay Area) - Account Manager, training for ultramarathon](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Jakub Rudnik (Chicago) - Managing Director](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Jenn (Location unspecified) - Role unspecified, started \~1 month ago](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)

### Series A Funding Announcement

  - [$12.5M raised from Madrona Venture Group](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Chose Madrona for their trust, reputation, and early Amazon investment](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Funding will enable aggressive investment (\~$12-14M) in 2023, primarily in hiring](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)
  - [Decision to raise driven by strong product-market fit and opportunity to seize market](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [Formal Series A process provides validation and de-risks company for employees/customers](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)

### Market Opportunity & Positioning

  - [Addressing pain points of expensive, underperforming agencies and tool fatigue](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Massive TAM: content marketing, content-related services, marketing/sales salaries](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Unique value prop: tech-enabled, tier-one talent, outcome-focused vs. tool-focused](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Strong customer validation: closing 5-6 figure deals in 1-2 short meetings](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Product Vision: "Content OS"

  - [Starting with content outcomes, expanding to broader knowledge work productivity](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Building AI-powered workflow engine to manage complex, scalable processes](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)
  - [Collecting valuable "frontier data" from expert human-in-the-loop interactions](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [Long-term vision: AI agents for workflow building, continuous learning/improvement](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)

### 2023 Goals & Growth Trajectory

  - [Currently at $6.2M ARR, 39 clients (ahead of projections)](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Year-end targets: $22M+ ARR, 100+ clients](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=2372.0)
  - [Scaling from 2 to 3-4 new client kick-offs per week](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=2379.0)
  - [Heavy investment ($12-16M) in people and resources to fuel growth](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=2388.0)

### Cultural Priorities

  - [Maintaining trust and reputation through high-quality client interactions](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=2462.0)
  - [Encouraging "builder mentality" - proactively improving processes, documentation](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=2492.0)
  - [Open feedback culture, especially regarding AI tool performance and workflow issues](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=2542.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Upcoming announcements on referral bonuses and company-wide bonus structure](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=2820.0)
  - [Formal funding announcement in \~1 month (keep confidential until then)](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=2805.0)
  - [Next all-hands will provide more details on hiring plan and capital deployment](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=2724.0)
  - [Team members encouraged to internalize and embody cultural principles](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
  - [Open door policy for feedback on company direction and decision-making](https://fathom.video/share/oVcGLNtqCEMsAVRk8zWeTCyZYhmcjCQv?tab=summary&timestamp=2724.0)
